Good self-presentation is also essential for upcoming client calls.</li><li>Strong self-organizational skills â ability to work full-time remotely with no supervision.</li><li>Reliability â we want to trust you and expect that you wonât let us and the client down.</li><li>Adaptability and Flexibility â the ability to onboard the project promptly after accepting it and start delivering results quickly.</li></ul><p>Sounds good for you?
